title: How We're Governed
editorialSummary: Social and political concepts grouped by domain. False trail: Capitalism and Socialism are economic systems, not government types — players may confuse them with Democracy or Oligarchy. Social Norm and Social Mobility are distinct sociological concepts that should not be confused with economic systems. IB Curriculum is a real international education framework (International Baccalaureate) and all curriculum models here are widely used in schools.

meta.gptRationale: The social-science terms are abstract and semantically close, so category boundaries are less obvious than the title suggests.
